name: part_012
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_012.webm

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame performs the final chorus of her original song 'Hanafubuki' during her 7th anniversary 3D live.
Ayame bows as the performance concludes; ending credits roll with an instrumental soundtrack.
A transition to a closing screen featuring a handwritten message from Ayame to her fans.

subtitles.english: Smile on this stage filled with light

subtitles.original: 闇を裂く旋律はゆらりと薫る
subtitles.english: The melody that pierces the darkness wafts gently

subtitles.original: 夢を咲かせましょう 花吹雪
subtitles.english: Let's make our dreams bloom, Hanafubuki

subtitles.original: 出演：百鬼あやめ、AZKi、兎田ぺこら、フワワ、モココ、大神ミオ
subtitles.english: Cast: Nakiri Ayame, AZKi, Usada Pekora, Fuwawa, Mococo, Ookami Mio

subtitles.original: 白上フブキ、さくらみこ、宝鐘マリン、天音かなた、雪花ラミィ
subtitles.english: Shirakami Fubuki, Sakura Miko, Houshou Marine, Amane Kanata, Yukihana Lamy

subtitles.original: 7周年記念ライブ見てくれてありがとう！新衣装にキレイなステージどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: Thank you for watching the 7th anniversary live! How did you like the new outfit and the beautiful stage?

subtitles.original: みんなが少しでも笑顔になってくれたら嬉しいです！！8年目もよろしくね！大好き！♡
subtitles.english: I'd be happy if this made you smile even just a little!! Look forward to my 8th year too! I love you! ♡
